sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n88727" key="prosariqmhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσᾰριθμ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n88727.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must reckon in</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:1:138" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.138</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
